title: feat: add keyboard shortcut for quit
body:
## Overview

Add Q keybind to quit maestro.

## Expected Behavior

Q exits the TUI.

## Acceptance Criteria

Pressing Q should quit the app cleanly with no resource leaks. Should also work from any screen.

## Files to Modify

- src/tui/app.rs

## Test Hints

Integration test on the event loop.

## Blocked By

- None

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Tests pass
